name: ADHD without help
argument: Pattern recognition engine running full blast, no structure. High gamma, low consensus, cognitive distance all over the place.

name: ADHD with help (cognitive offloading, tools, structure)
argument: Same engine, but with rails. Same gamma, but the output goes somewhere. Cognitive distance becomes navigable because you have external memory, documentation, systems.

name: paranoia/hallucination
argument: Extreme cognitive engagement, no consensus, experience is near but not shared.

name: Synvilla
argument: High consensus, low gamma, near experience.

name: Cooking
argument: Common, low cognitive engagement, near experience.

name: Driving
argument: Moderate consensus, low gamma, near experience.

name: Counting / Native language
argument: Universal consensus, very low gamma, near experience.

name: Programming (traditional)
argument: High consensus, moderate gamma, moderate cognitive distance.

name: Programming (with AI)
argument: High consensus, lower gamma, lower cognitive distance due to AI assistance.

name: Relativity (Einstein's era)
argument: Low consensus, high gamma, far cognitive distance.

name: Relativity (textbook)
argument: High consensus, moderate gamma, far cognitive distance but more accessible.

name: Wave theory (SI/traditional)
argument: High consensus, high gamma, far cognitive distance.

name: Wave theory (B1C3 integer)
argument: Moderate consensus, lower gamma, closer cognitive distance due to new notation.

name: Arabic script (Swedish speaker)
argument: Low consensus, moderate gamma, far cognitive distance for non-native.

name: Arabic (with transliteration)
argument: Moderate consensus, lower gamma, closer cognitive distance due to transliteration.

name: Imaginary numbers (notation)
argument: High consensus, high gamma, far cognitive distance.

name: Imaginary numbers (POV explanation)
argument: High consensus, lower gamma, closer cognitive distance due to better explanation.

name: Logarithms (notation)
argument: High consensus, moderate gamma, far cognitive distance.

name: Logarithms (plain language)
argument: High consensus, lower gamma, closer cognitive distance due to plain language.

name: Skateboarding tricks (pre-Mullen)
argument: Low consensus, high gamma, far cognitive distance.

name: Skateboarding tricks (Mullen/physics)
argument: Moderate consensus, moderate gamma, closer cognitive distance due to physics explanation.

name: Improvisational jazz (high skill, intuitive, unstructured)
argument: Low consensus, high gamma, near experience but unstructured.

name: Quantum field theory
argument: High consensus, high gamma, far cognitive distance.

name: Fairytales for kids
argument: Everyone knows them, deeply propagated across cultures. Low engagement for listener, near experience.

name: Predatory shaman
argument: Small group, cult-like, high engagement in victim, far cognitive distance.

name: Actual shamanic medicine
argument: Pre-standardized, real pattern recognition, cognitive distance is navigable.
